title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: helm-ollama
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and autoscaling.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight Go CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick pulls, lists and chat from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot.vim
summary: Experimental fork bringing local Ollama completions into Vim/Neovim via Copilot.vim bindings.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Starter repo for retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings + Chroma/Qdrant vector stores.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Native n8n node that lets you call Ollama models inside no-code workflows (chat, completion, embed).

title: ollama-grafana-datasource
summary: Grafana datasource plugin that visualizes Ollama runtime metrics (tokens/sec, queue depth, GPU util).

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples (CPU & GPU variants, AMD & NVIDIA).

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes, brainstorm or translate locally.

title: ollama-meson
summary: Meson wrap file to build libollama as a C/C++ dependency for native applications.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with tokio/hyper.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting C#/F#; includes ASP.NET Core integration sample.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service that proxies and extends Ollama with JWT auth, rate limits, and usage logs.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that talks to Ollama; supports markdown, code highlighting, and session memory.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python-based Discord bot that brings local LLM power to any server via slash commands and threads.
